changes: Nav bar inner div: changed items-center to items-stretch
Logo <a> tag: reverted self-center back to self-stretch (text-white preserved)
Right column div: changed from 'hidden md:flex flex-col gap-6 items-end shrink' to 'flex flex-col md:gap-6 items-end shrink min-w-0' (removed hidden, added min-w-0, gap now md: prefixed)
Utility row inner div: added hidden md:flex (moved visibility control from parent to child)
Moved entire <nav> element inside the right column div (after utility row div)
Removed md:mt-6 from <nav> class (spacing now handled by parent md:gap-6)
Mobile toggle button remains as third direct child of nav bar inner div
Nav bar inner div: changed items-center to items-stretch
ImageDropUploader className: reverted self-center back to self-stretch (text-white preserved)
Logo <a> className: reverted self-center back to self-stretch (text-white preserved)
Right column div: changed from 'hidden md:flex flex-col gap-6 items-end shrink' to 'flex flex-col md:gap-6 items-end shrink min-w-0'
Utility row inner div: added hidden md:flex (moved visibility control from parent to child)
Moved <nav> element inside the right column div (after utility row div)
Removed md:mt-6 from <nav> className (spacing now handled by parent md:gap-6)
Mobile toggle button remains as third direct child of nav bar inner div

fixesApplied.description: Restructured desktop layout so the logo spans both rows. The <nav> element is now inside the right column div alongside the utility row, making the right column a two-row flex-col that the logo (self-stretch) can span against. Previously the nav was a sibling below the nav-bar-inner div, so the logo could only stretch to the single utility-row height.
Changed nav bar inner from items-center to items-stretch so the logo <a> with self-stretch fills the full height of the right column (utility row + gap + nav row).
Reverted logo self-center back to self-stretch (from revision 1 fix) since items-stretch on the parent now makes self-stretch meaningful. text-white is preserved from revision 1.

structureAfter.description: Nav bar inner (flex items-stretch justify-between) > [Logo <a> (self-stretch text-white), Right column (flex flex-col md:gap-6 items-end shrink min-w-0) > [Utility row (hidden md:flex), Nav (header-collapsable, all mobile collapsible classes preserved)], Mobile toggle (md:hidden)]

mobilePreservation: Mobile toggle button remains a direct sibling of logo and right column at the nav-bar-inner level
Nav collapsible classes (max-md:max-h-0, max-md:opacity-0, max-md:pointer-events-none, menu-open:*) all preserved
Mobile divider, mobile search, mobile CTA section all preserved inside <nav>
Utility row now has hidden md:flex so it remains desktop-only

warnings: Pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs — unrelated to Header block

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP structure are in sync. The pre-existing depth-1 structure warning is expected due to conditional rendering in TSX (logo only renders when !logo / !!logo) vs PHP's static conditional output.
